name: Tortellini with Artichokes, Olives and Feta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 packages refrigerated cheese-filled spinach tortellini, 9 oz each
2 jars marinated artichoke hearts, quartered, drained, 4 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions. Remove and rinse well under cold water until pasta is cool.
2. Combine pasta, artichoke hearts, carrots, olives, and feta cheese in a large bowl. Add salad dressing; toss lightly. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
